name: chart/polar
description: A polar coordinate plot — categories around the circle, value as radius. Bars (a rose), or a polar line/area.

meta.name: Polar
meta.description: A polar coordinate plot — categories around the circle, value as radius. Bars (a rose), or a polar line/area.

props.name: data
props.description: One entry per category: { label, value, color? }.

props.name: mode
props.description: Bars (rose), a polar line, or a filled polar area.

props.name: max
props.description: Domain top (full radius). Defaults to the largest value.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no rings or labels. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Wind rose
examples.code:
import { Polar } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Polar
  title="Wind by direction"
  mode="bar"
  tooltip
  data={[
    { label: 'N', value: 12 },
    { label: 'E', value: 8 },
    { label: 'S', value: 5 },
    { label: 'W', value: 15 },
  ]}
/>

whenToUse: Cyclical/directional categories where the circle is meaningful (wind, hours, months)
A rose chart comparing a value across directions
whenNotToUse: Multi-metric profiles on shared axes — use Radar

related.name: Radar
related.reason: Use to compare several series across the same axes

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img"; values are in the fallback table.
